name: Schumann Resonance 1st
description: Primary Schumann resonance — global electromagnetic resonance in the cavity between Earth's surface and ionosphere. Driven by lightning discharges worldwide (~100 strikes/second).
effects: Syncs with human alpha/theta brainwaves; implicated in circadian rhythms

name: Schumann Resonance 2nd Harmonic
description: Second harmonic of the Schumann resonance.

name: Schumann Resonance 3rd Harmonic
description: Third harmonic of the Schumann resonance.

name: Schumann Resonance 4th Harmonic
description: Fourth harmonic of the Schumann resonance.

name: Schumann Resonance 5th Harmonic
description: Fifth harmonic of the Schumann resonance.

name: Solfeggio 174 Hz
description: Lowest Solfeggio frequency. Associated with pain relief and sense of security. Foundation tone of the body.

name: Solfeggio 285 Hz
description: Associated with tissue healing and regeneration. Influences energy fields around body.

name: Solfeggio 396 Hz
description: Liberating guilt and fear. Transforms grief into joy, turns negative energy into positive.

name: Solfeggio 417 Hz
description: Facilitating change, undoing situations and facilitating change. Connects with solar plexus energy.

name: Solfeggio 528 Hz — Miracle Tone
description: The 'love frequency' or 'miracle tone'. Claimed to repair DNA and bring transformation. Middle frequency of the original 6 Solfeggio tones. Used by geneticists to repair broken DNA.

name: Solfeggio 639 Hz
description: Connecting/relationships. Enhances communication, understanding, tolerance, and love. Reconnects with relationships.

name: Solfeggio 741 Hz
description: Awakening intuition, solving problems. Cleanses cells from electromagnetic radiations. Expresses and communicates.

name: Solfeggio 852 Hz
description: Returning to spiritual order. Enables cell to transform itself into a higher energy system.

name: Solfeggio 963 Hz
description: Divine consciousness and enlightenment. The frequency of the pineal gland. Re-connects with the spirit and awakens system to perfect state.

name: 432 Hz — Universal Tuning
description: Alternative concert pitch where A4=432 Hz instead of standard 440 Hz. Claimed to be more harmonically aligned with the universe and Pythagorean mathematics. Mathematically related to 8 Hz (432 = 8 × 54) and appears in many ancient architectural measurements.

name: Earth Year Frequency (Om)
description: The frequency of Earth's year translated to audible range by raising 32 octaves. Calculated as 1/365.25 days × 86400 sec × 2^32 ≈ 136.1 Hz. Known as 'Om' in Hindu tradition. Close to C#3/Db3 at 138.59 Hz in equal temperament.

name: Earth Day Frequency
description: Frequency of Earth's 24-hour rotation translated to audible range. 1/86400 seconds × 2^24 ≈ 194.18 Hz. Close to G3 at 196 Hz.

name: Root Chakra — Muladhara
description: Root chakra frequency. Associated with grounding, survival, security, physical existence. Related to C note in scientific pitch notation (C4=256 Hz, not 261.63 Hz equal temperament). Color: Red.

name: Sacral Chakra — Svadhisthana
description: Sacral chakra frequency. Associated with creativity, sexuality, emotion, pleasure. Color: Orange.

name: Solar Plexus Chakra — Manipura
description: Solar plexus chakra frequency. Associated with personal power, will, confidence, transformation. Color: Yellow.

name: Heart Chakra — Anahata
description: Heart chakra frequency. Associated with love, compassion, healing, integration. Bridges lower and upper chakras. Color: Green.

name: Throat Chakra — Vishuddha
description: Throat chakra frequency. Associated with communication, expression, truth, creativity. Color: Blue.

name: Third Eye Chakra — Ajna
description: Third eye chakra frequency. Associated with intuition, wisdom, insight, psychic ability. Color: Indigo.

name: Crown Chakra — Sahasrara
description: Crown chakra frequency. Associated with divine connection, enlightenment, unity consciousness. Color: Violet/White.

name: Gamma Brainwave — 40 Hz
description: 40 Hz gamma oscillation. Associated with peak cognition, consciousness binding, and working memory. Deficient in Alzheimer's patients. Used in therapeutic light/sound stimulation research (MIT/Tsai lab studies show 40 Hz reduces amyloid plaques).

name: AC Mains Hum — 60 Hz (North America)
description: North American electrical grid frequency. Audible as 60 Hz hum in poorly shielded equipment. Harmonics at 120, 180, 240 Hz. The fundamental tone of virtually all American electrical infrastructure.

name: AC Mains Hum — 50 Hz (Europe/Asia)
description: European/Asian electrical grid frequency. Slightly lower and 'heavier' than 60 Hz hum. All electronics in these regions reference this fundamental.
